artifacts.purpose: Canonical agent guidance (mission, Bootstrap Handoff, Active Sources for this toolkit, working rules, verification, final response)
Current repo state, active work, blockers, next actions, verification commands, and unrecorded repo memory
Durable decisions and supersessions (pilot outcomes, layout migration, evidence rule, git safety, one-scoped-commit, etc.)
Verification commands and policy, fact-bearing paths, guidance paths, project notes
Inventory of the durable guidance artifacts with custody evidence from git at time of bootstrap
